name: Banking · FAQ match & answer
description: Match a request to a topic, then answer in that context.

name: Banking · action items
description: Turn a request into a JSON list of action items.

name: Banking · answer
description: Read a request, draft a helpful reply.

name: Banking · classify intent
description: Classify a request into one label.

name: Banking · draft, critique, revise
description: Draft a reply, self-critique it, then produce a revised final.

name: Banking · extract to JSON
description: Extract structured fields from a request as JSON.

name: Banking · keyword extract
description: Pull the top keywords from a request as a JSON array.

name: Banking · language route
description: Detect the language of a request; answer directly if English, else translate first.

name: Banking · moderation gate
description: Check a request for policy issues before publishing.

name: Banking · redact & summarize
description: Redact personal data from a request, then summarize the rest.

name: Banking · score & gate
description: Score a request 1-5 for priority, then gate on the number.

name: Banking · sentiment route
description: Detect sentiment of a request, escalate the negative ones.

name: Banking · severity tiers
description: Classify severity of a request, then route across three tiers with chained checks.

name: Banking · summarize then decide
description: Summarize a request, then branch on whether it needs follow-up.

name: Banking · tag & enrich
description: Produce a JSON list of topic tags for a request.

name: Banking · tone rewrite
description: Rewrite a request in a warm, professional tone.

name: Banking · translate & reply
description: Translate a request to English, then draft a reply.

name: Banking · triage & route
description: Draft a reply, then route urgent vs normal on a keyword check.

description: Turn a brief into a JSON list of action items.

name: Marketing · answer
description: Read a brief, draft a helpful reply.

name: Marketing · classify intent
description: Classify a brief into one label.

name: Marketing · draft, critique, revise
description: Draft a reply, self-critique it, then produce a revised final.

name: Marketing · extract to JSON
description: Extract structured fields from a brief as JSON.

name: Marketing · keyword extract
description: Pull the top keywords from a brief as a JSON array.

name: Marketing · language route
description: Detect the language of a brief; answer directly if English, else translate first.

name: Marketing · moderation gate
description: Check a brief for policy issues before publishing.

name: Marketing · redact & summarize
description: Redact personal data from a brief, then summarize the rest.

name: Marketing · score & gate
description: Score a brief 1-5 for priority, then gate on the number.

name: Marketing · sentiment route
description: Detect sentiment of a brief, escalate the negative ones.

name: Marketing · severity tiers
description: Classify severity of a brief, then route across three tiers with chained checks.

name: Marketing · summarize then decide
description: Summarize a brief, then branch on whether it needs follow-up.

name: Marketing · tag & enrich
description: Produce a JSON list of topic tags for a brief.

name: Marketing · tone rewrite
description: Rewrite a brief in a warm, professional tone.

name: Marketing · translate & reply
description: Translate a brief to English, then draft a reply.

name: Marketing · triage & route
description: Draft a reply, then route urgent vs normal on a keyword check.
